zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie於1249年4月9日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾利卡頓時，他的父親Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle51歲，母親Christine Kilbane24歲。他於1268年與Margaret de Crawford在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1307年5月10日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度享年58歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie于1249年4月9日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾利卡頓时，他的父亲Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle51岁，母亲Christine Kilbane24岁。他于1268年与Margaret de Crawford在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1307年5月10日在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度享年58岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie was born on 9 April 1249, in Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle, was 51 and his mother, Christine Kilbane, was 24. He married Margaret de Crawford in 1268, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 10 May 1307, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 58, and was buried in Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie est né le 9 avril 1249, à Riccarton, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Christine Kilbane, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Crawford en 1268, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1307, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie am 9. April 1249 in Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle 51 und seine Mutter Christine Kilbane 24. Er hat 1268 in Ayrshire, Scotland Margaret de Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 10. Mai 1307 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie è nato il il 9 aprile 1249 nel Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Christine Kilbane, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Crawford nel 1268, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 10 maggio 1307, nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslieが1249年4月9日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアリクカートンで生まれた時，父Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyleは51歳，母Christine Kilbaneは24歳であった。1268年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでMargaret de Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1307年5月10日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで58歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie(이)가 1249년 4월 9일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 릭카턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Christine Kilbane(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1268년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Margaret de Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1307년 5월 10일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르에 묻혔다.

pt.9 April 1249–10 May 1307: 9 de abril de 1249–10 de maio de 1307
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie nasceu em 9 de abril de 1249, em Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Christine Kilbane, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Crawford em 1268, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1307, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie родился 9 апреля 1249 г. в местности риккартон, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Christine Kilbane, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Crawford в 1268 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 10 мая 1307 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности аиршир, Шотландия.

es.9 April 1249–10 May 1307: 9 de abril de 1249–10 de mayo de 1307
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie nació el 9 de abril de 1249, en Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Christine Kilbane, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret de Crawford en 1268, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1307, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Ayrshire, Scotland.
